title: Trapped in Tia Juana
writer: Rex Lease, Wallace Fox, Carlos F. Borcosque
actors: Edwina Booth, Duncan Renaldo, Dot Farley
plot: An American army officer, Kenneth Holbert, is after a Mexican bandit, El Zorro, who he doesn't know is his long-lost twin brother. Dorothy Holbert has a hard time figuring out which is which, especially since Romanian native Renal...
